headline: CrowdStrike Perplexity AI Tie Up Brings Falcon Into Core Workflows
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) and Perplexity AI have agreed to integrate the CrowdStrike Falcon platform directly into Perplexity's enterprise AI browser workflows. The partnership connects Falcon's browser security, including capabilities from the Seraphic acquisition, to real time AI driven work within Perplexity's interface. Organizations using Perplexity's enterprise AI browser can apply security policies, data loss prevention, and gain visibility into AI native workflows at the...

headline: How the Iran War Could Upend AI
summary: It isn’t just oil that’s at risk in an extended war. Key chip-making ingredients like helium and bromine come from the Middle East—as does an increasing amount of AI funding.

headline: SentinelOne CEO: Microsoft has more vulnerabilities than any other company
summary: SentinelOne (NYSE:S) CEO Tomer Weingarten made a pointed claim on live TV recently that cuts right to the heart of the enterprise security debate: “Microsoft has the most vulnerabilities and that is factual than any other company in the world.” That is a bold statement. And it is the foundation of a broader investment thesis ... SentinelOne CEO: Microsoft has more vulnerabilities than any other company
